description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: build & test Docker images that runs on push to main and master branches, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should find changed files, then build and test Docker images if changes are detected or if the workflow is dispatched. Use a reusable workflow to find changes, then check out the repository, build specific Docker images sequentially, run C++ and Python tests, a sample simulation, and test the installation process.
